title: node/stack: UDP header built inline with magic offsets
description: In stack.rs:262-282, IPv6/UDP headers are built manually with magic offsets (40, 42, 44, etc.). The IPv6 header uses Ipv6Header::write_to, but UDP header is built inline. Consider a UdpHeader::write_to or named constants for UDP header offsets.
close_reason: Replaced inline UDP header construction with UdpHeader::write_to from lichen-ipv6. Removed duplicate checksum helper functions (udp_checksum, oc_add, checksum_bytes, pseudo_sum, finalize). Magic offsets 40, 42, 44, 46, 48 replaced with IPV6_HEADER_LEN constant expressions.
